title: Working Student CRM Analytics (gn)
core_responsibilities: Analyse and evaluate performance of CRM campaigns and lifecycle measures (Open Rate, Click Rate, etc.)
Support data analyses in Databricks including data extraction, preparation and cleaning
Derive data-driven insights and concrete recommendations for campaign and segmentation optimisation
Support automation and further development of CRM reporting
recommended_emphasis: Lead with CRM analytics and campaign performance analysis experience — directly maps to the core role
Highlight customer segmentation and cohort analysis work to reinforce lifecycle campaign context
Emphasise SQL and Python for data extraction/preparation as a functional substitute for Databricks experience
Reference Power BI and Looker Studio dashboards to demonstrate BI reporting capability
Frame prior working-student and internship experience to match the Werkstudent seniority level — avoid signalling overqualification
Mention any recurring or automated reporting work to align with the reporting automation responsibility
